name: Foolproof Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: 18 oz Packages semi sweet chocolate chips
14 oz Can EAGLE BRAND SWEETENED condensed milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a glass bowl or 1 quart measuring cup, combine the chocolate chips with the sweetened condensed milk.
2. Microwave on full power (high) for 3 minutes.
3. Stir until the chocolate melts and the mixture is smooth.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
5. Spread the mixture evenly into a wax paper-lined 8 or 9 inch square pan, making sure to line the bottom and sides for easy removal.
6. Chill for 2 hours or until firm.
7. Turn the fudge onto a board, peel off the wax paper, and cut into squares.
8. Store loosely covered at room temperature.
CREAMY DARK FUDGE
- Melt 2 cups of miniature marshmallows with the chocolate chips and milk. Proceed as above.
MILK CHOCOLATE FUDGE
- Omit one (6 oz) package of semi-sweet chips.
- Add 1 cup milk chocolate chips.
- Proceed as above.
CREAMY MILK CHOCOLATE FUDGE
- Omit one (6 oz) package of semi-sweet chips.
- Add 1 cup milk chocolate chips and 2 cups miniature marshmallows.
- Proceed as above.
MEXICAN FUDGE
- Reduce vanilla to 1 teaspoon.
- Add 1 tablespoon instant coffee powder and 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon to the sweetened milk. Proceed as above.
BUTTERSCOTCH FUDGE
- Omit chocolate chips and vanilla.
- Melt 2 (12 oz) packages butterscotch chips with the sweetened milk.
- When the chips are melted, stir in 2 tablespoons white vinegar, a dash of salt, 1/2 teaspoon maple flavoring, and 1 cup chopped nuts. Proceed as above.
